title: commiphora discolor
intro: Commiphora discolor, also known as the African myrrh or khaya, is a species of tree found in Africa, belonging to the Burseraceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Commiphora discolor include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve steam distillation to extract its essential oil, which can be used in traditional medicine, aromatherapy, and skincare products.
